title: Štip, Eastern — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Štip, Eastern: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Štip is a city in Eastern with a population of 43,000. A city in eastern North Macedonia on the Bregalnica River, known for its textile industry, the Isar Fortress, and the annual Štip Cultural Summer festival.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
